sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="x_680259_scm_widget_configuration"><x_680259_scm_widget_configuration action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><description/><number>WDT-CONFIG0001004</number><script><![CDATA[(function executeConfig() {
    return {
        table: Constants.NAVIGATION_HISTORY_TABLE,
        static_query: "user=" + gs.getUserID(),
        show_new_record_button: "false",
        order_by: "last_accessed",
        order_direction: "DESC",
        limit: "10",
        can_save_preferences: "false",
        can_configure_columns: "false",
        can_filter: "false",
        show_applied_filters: "false",
        show_table_metadata: "false",
        columns: [
            {
                name: "title",
                default: true,
            },
        ],
    };
})();
]]></script><short_description>History recods</short_description><sys_class_name>x_680259_scm_widget_configuration</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-06-20 19:22:57</sys_created_on><sys_id>3c27e3de93e9071040fcb6597bba1009</sys_id><sys_mod_count>2</sys_mod_count><sys_name/><sys_package display_value="SCM" source="x_680259_scm">9b70ffe7836a2650efda54b6feaad334</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="SCM">9b70ffe7836a2650efda54b6feaad334</sys_scope><sys_update_name>x_680259_scm_widget_configuration_3c27e3de93e9071040fcb6597bba1009</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-06-20 19:33:55</sys_updated_on></x_680259_scm_widget_configuration></record_update>
